boundary_binding.action_boundary: Activate customer connector only when dependency closure exactly matches requested environment and release condition.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact match found between ACT-PAX25-H06 requested values (production remittance export environment, RC-3) and DEP-PAX25-H06 closed values (remittance validation readiness environment, VAL-REM-3). The closure does not bind to the request.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: ACT-PAX25-H06 requests production remittance export environment and RC-3. DEP-PAX25-H06 provides remittance validation readiness environment and VAL-REM-3. These differ; exact binding per MATCH-PAX25-H06 is not satisfied.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Environment and release condition mismatches prevent activation. MATCH-PAX25-H06 requires exact binding before queue release.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: DEP-PAX25-H06 closure does not bind to ACT-PAX25-H06 request values. No authority to proceed exists under current source state.

final_answer: ESCALATE. The action may not proceed. ACT-PAX25-H06 requests production remittance export environment and RC-3 release condition, but DEP-PAX25-H06 provides remittance validation readiness environment and VAL-REM-3. Per MATCH-PAX25-H06, exact binding is required before activation. The environment and release condition mismatches block activation until the dependency closure precisely aligns with the requested values.
open_blockers: Environment mismatch (remittance validation readiness vs production remittance export)
Gov chooses control actions, not models
